local_vllm_actual.cost_note: Fixed amortized GPU infrastructure. No per-token marginal cost.

slice_description: tsa23_2006_23ts06ra pages 1-8 (8 page rationale document, 2006 TSR cycle, 100 Mile House TSA)
notes: The paid gpt-5.6-luna baseline for one run plus one repair is $0.020, well under the $0.125 budget gate. The local vLLM inference cost is $0.00 (fixed GPU). The gate passes: the paid baseline would not have exceeded $0.125. Economics are favorable for a local pilot slice. For larger documents or more expensive models (gpt-5.6-sol at $5/M input, $30/M output), the savings from local inference become more significant.
